/privacy.title: NVR Interiors & Exteriors
/privacy.description: NVR Interiors & Exteriors offers premium interior & exterior solutions in TamilNadu, Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh — modular kitchens, ACP cladding, UPVC windows, structural glazing & more. Get a free consultation!
p: At NVR Interiors & Exteriors, we collect essential customer information such as names, phone numbers, email addresses, project details, and design preferences to provide better interior and exterior solutions.
The information collected helps us understand customer requirements, improve our services, manage projects efficiently, and ensure smooth communication throughout the project process.

Customer information is used for project planning, quotations, customer support, service updates, and improving overall client experience. We only use the information for legitimate business purposes.
We may share limited project-related information with trusted contractors, suppliers, or service partners involved in completing your project. We do not sell or misuse customer data.
We take appropriate security measures to protect customer information from unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure. All project and customer details are handled with confidentiality.
Customers have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of their personal information at any time by contacting us directly.
With your permission, we may share updates, offers, or new service information related to our interior and exterior solutions. Customers can opt out anytime.
NVR Interiors & Exteriors may update this Privacy Policy when required. Any changes will be reflected on our official website or communication channels.
We are passionate about creating stunning and functional interiors and exteriors that elevate your living and working spaces.
